# llms.txt — Met71 Spain

Met71 Spain is an international import & export company coordinating trade between Spain/Europe and Egypt/North Africa.

## What we do
- Import: premium European vehicles, firefighting equipment, and critical spare parts
- Export: agricultural products and fertilizers (cold-chain capable when required)
- Trade enablement: customs documentation, regulatory coordination, market analysis, and logistics management

## Primary audiences
- Importers/exporters operating between Europe and North Africa
- Businesses needing end-to-end shipping + documentation coordination
- Partners: freight forwarders, customs brokers, suppliers

## Key pages
- Home: https://met71spain.com/
- About: https://met71spain.com/about
- Services: https://met71spain.com/services
- Industries: https://met71spain.com/industries
- Logistics: https://met71spain.com/logistics
- Contact: https://met71spain.com/contact

## Contact
- Email: exports@met71spain.com
